title: Oil falls as supply issues ease
section_path: Oil falls as supply issues ease
section_path_text: Oil falls as supply issues ease
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
A risk-off tone across markets saw commodities start the week on the back foot. Renewed outbreaks of COVID-19 in China also weighed on sentiment, while a stronger USD dampened investor appetite. Crude oil fell as supply disruptions eased and COVID in China fed into weakness across global markets.
